Event: Darkness Castle Siege Oct 2025
Event Date: 13/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A253
Shining Shield Artifact

Triggers: Every 8 sec

Arctic Cold
The artifact's owner deals magic damage equal to 30% of their spell power to 4 random enemy units, and freezes them for 3 sec. During this time, the frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown time of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
